name: User Authentication API
description: JWT-based authentication endpoints for user registration, login, logout, and token refresh

name: Forum Data API
description: RESTful endpoints for categories, threads, posts, votes, and search operations with pagination

name: WebSocket Notification Interface
description: Real-time bidirectional communication for notifications, live updates, and thread activity

name: Notification Management API
description: Endpoints for managing user notifications, marking as read, and notification preferences

name: Frontend Component Interface
description: React component contracts with TypeScript interfaces for props and state management
